sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN days_diff < 0 THEN 'Before start (pre-provisioned)'
        WHEN days_diff = 0 THEN 'Same day'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 1 AND 7 THEN '1-7 days after'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN '8-30 days after'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 31 AND 180 THEN '1-6 months after'
        ELSE 'More than 6 months after'
    END AS procurement_timing,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(warranty_duration_days)) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(MIN(warranty_duration_days)) AS min_warranty_days,
    ROUND(MAX(warranty_duration_days)) AS max_warranty_days
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)) AS warranty_duration_days
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
) sub
GROUP BY procurement_timing
ORDER BY asset_count DESC;

sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN warranty_at_start < 0 THEN 'Expired before start'
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN 0 AND 90 THEN '0-90 days warranty at start'
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN 91 AND 180 THEN '91-180 days warranty at start'
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN 181 AND 365 THEN '6-12 months warranty at start'
        ELSE 'More than 1 year warranty at start'
    END AS warranty_coverage_at_onboarding,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(days_diff)) AS avg_days_purchased_before_start,
    a.department
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) AS warranty_at_start,
        u.department
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
) a
GROUP BY warranty_coverage_at_onboarding, department
ORDER BY department, asset_count DESC;

sql:
SELECT
    a.model_category,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_asset_after_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_days_at_start,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_cost
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY a.model_category
ORDER BY avg_warranty_days_at_start ASC;

sql:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on) AS purchase_month,
    TO_CHAR(a.purchased_on, 'Mon') AS month_name,
    COUNT(*) AS assets_purchased,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_before_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_duration
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on), TO_CHAR(a.purchased_on, 'Mon')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on);

sql:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date) AS start_month,
    TO_CHAR(u.start_date, 'Mon') AS month_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS employees_starting,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS assets_assigned,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_purchased_vs_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_remaining_at_start
FROM flag_18_sysuser u
LEFT JOIN flag_18 a ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date), TO_CHAR(u.start_date, 'Mon')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date);

sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', a.warranty_expiration) AS expiry_month,
    COUNT(*) AS warranties_expiring,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_asset_cost,
    SUM(a.cost) AS total_replacement_cost_estimate,
    array_agg(DISTINCT a.model_category) AS categories_expiring
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', a.warranty_expiration)
ORDER BY expiry_month;

sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN a.cost < 500 THEN 'Under $500'
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN 500 AND 1999 THEN '$500-$1,999'
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN 2000 AND 4999 THEN '$2,000-$4,999'
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-$9,999'
        ELSE '$10,000+'
    END AS cost_tier,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(STDDEV(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS stddev_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    a.model_category
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY cost_tier, a.model_category
ORDER BY MIN(a.cost), a.model_category;

sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', a.purchased_on) AS purchase_batch,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', u.start_date) AS employee_start_cohort,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS affected_employees,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS assets_at_risk,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_days_at_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assets_expiring_within_year1,
    SUM(a.cost) AS total_cost_at_risk
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
WHERE a.purchased_on BETWEEN '2023-05-01' AND '2023-08-31'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', a.purchased_on), DATE_TRUNC('month', u.start_date)
ORDER BY purchase_batch, employee_start_cohort;

sql:
SELECT
    width_bucket(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)), -400, 30, 10) AS bucket_num,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_before_start,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN a.cost ELSE 0 END) AS cost_expiring_yr1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '24 months' THEN a.cost ELSE 0 END) AS cost_expiring_yr2
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY bucket_num
ORDER BY bucket_num;

sql:
SELECT
    u.department,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS employees,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS total_assets,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_purchase_vs_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assets_expiring_yr1,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(a.asset_tag), 1) AS pct_expiring_yr1,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_asset_cost
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY u.department
ORDER BY avg_warranty_at_start_days DESC;
